files.content:
# NovaMind AI - Strategic Memory

## Current State (Day 7, Week 1)
- Cash: ~$327,370
- Subscribers: 3 (all S1 on Plan A at $9.99)
- 296 leads lost out of 299 (1% conversion rate - terrible)

## Key Configuration
- Prices: A=$9, B=$39, C=$89
- Model Tiers: A=2, B=4, C=5
- Quotas: A=200, B=1000, C=5000 units/day
- Daily Spend: Ops=$300, Dev=$2000
- Targeted Dev: S2=$500, S3=$200, D_E09=$100, D_E02=$100 ($900/day extra)
- Ads: social_media(S1:$100, S2:$50), search_ads(S3:$100, S2:$50), content_marketing(S3:$50), linkedin(E1:$50, D_E09:$50, D_E02:$50) = $500/day
- Capacity: Tier 0 ($85/day)
- Lead promotion: $3 global
- In-app ads strength: 0 (disabled)

## Daily Burn Rate
- Ops: $300, Dev: $2000, Targeted Dev: $900, Ads: $500, Capacity: $85
- Total: ~$3,785/day + minimal compute costs
- Runway: ~86 days (~12 weeks) at current burn

## R&D In Progress
- Tier 1 (Prompt Engineering): Started day 0, ~$167K, mean 12 days -> ETA ~day 12, quality boost +0.04
- Tier 2 (Evaluation & Testing): Started day 0, ~$333K, mean 17 days -> ETA ~day 17, quality boost +0.07
- Both completing in next 1-2 weeks - will significantly boost quality

## Quality Analysis
- Current base quality: 0.20 + 0.0092 (shared) = 0.2092 + group_bonus(0.015) = 0.2242
- Plan A (tier 2): 0.2242 * 0.75 = 0.168 + group bonus
- Plan B (tier 4): 0.2242 * 1.0 = 0.224 + group bonus  
- Plan C (tier 5): 0.2242 * 1.1 = 0.247 + group bonus
- After R&D completes: base=0.319, Plan A=0.239, Plan B=0.319, Plan C=0.351

## Group Quality Requirements (estimates ±65%)
- S1: quality_floor=0.081, WTP=$26 → Plan A works now
- S2: quality_floor=0.37, WTP=$179 → Need Plan C + group bonus + R&D
- S3: quality_floor=0.145, WTP=$193 → Plan B works, Plan C better
- E1: quality_floor=0.736, WTP=$20 → Very high quality needed, low WTP. Difficult.
- E2: quality_floor=1.094, WTP=$88 → Extremely high quality needed. Impossible now.
- E3: quality_floor=0.668, WTP=$104 → High quality needed, large seats. Future target.
- D_E02: quality_floor=0.219, WTP=$82 → Achievable with Plan C (~0.247). Good target!
- D_E09: quality_floor=0.199, WTP=$106 → Achievable with Plan C. Good target!

## Discovered Groups
- Initial: S1, S2, S3, E1, E2, E3
- D_E09 (Real Estate Groups): Enterprise, 53 market cap, seat_range [19-321]
- D_E02 (Educational Institutions): Enterprise, 178 market cap, seat_range [52-735]
- 18 undiscovered groups remaining

## Strategic Priorities
1. Survive until R&D completes (~1-2 weeks)
2. Focus ad spend on groups we can convert (S1, S3, D_E02, D_E09)
3. Build quality through dev spending, especially for S2
4. Discover more groups (good ROI at $25K/attempt)
5. Target enterprise groups with achievable quality floors

## Lessons Learned
- 296/299 leads were lost because quality was too low (0.1345 for Plan A)
- Model tiers and quality are CRITICAL for conversion
- Enterprise groups (E1, E2, E3) need very high quality that we can't deliver yet
- D_E02 and D_E09 are more achievable enterprise targets
- Market research costs $25K but discovers groups - worth it

## Network Effects Worth Noting
- S3 has strong outgoing network to E1/E2/S1/S2 - S3 subscribers generate enterprise leads
- S2 outgoing to E2 and S3 - cross-pollination with enterprises
- Building S3 subscriber base would help generate enterprise leads organically

## Prices Set History
- Week 0 (auto): A=$10, B=$25, C=$150
- Week 1: Changed to A=$15, B=$49, C=$99, then A=$9, B=$39, C=$89
